reasoning: A warehouse tool requires command-center focus, low glare in dark environments, and high-visibility data points for instant price scanning. Dark background with stark white text and electric yellow accents provides maximum utility.

scale.h1_price: text-5xl or text-6xl (absolute massive size for one-glance reading)
scale.caption: text-sm text-secondary tracking-wider uppercase

rules: Prices MUST use fontWeight '900' and tight tracking.
Never center-align product lists; always left-align names and right-align prices.

layout_and_spacing.ergonomics: ONE-HAND OPERATION. The primary search input and scanner toggle MUST be anchored to the BOTTOM of the screen above the keyboard/safe area.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous touch targets (min 48px height) for all buttons and inputs. Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards.
layout_and_spacing.lists: Dense but readable. Flat backgrounds with 1px border. No soft shadows.

search_bar.features: Fuzzy search with Turkish char support. Massive input field. Clear 'X' button to reset instantly. Auto-focus optimized.

product_list.style: Flat rows, bottom border only (border-b border-[#262626]). Left side: Name (white). Right side: Price (Yellow, huge). Flat structure without wrapping in heavy cards.

scanner_view.overlay: Camera full screen. Black 70% opacity overlay with a central clear rectangle.
scanner_view.indicators: Pulsing 1px electric yellow border around the scan window when 'Speed Mode' is active.

speed_mode_toggle.style: Prominent floating action button or inline pill near the bottom right of the search area. High-contrast active state.

admin_panel.style: Standard top-down layout. Prominent massive dropzone/button for Excel/CSV upload.

motion_and_haptics.haptics: MANDATORY. Heavy vibration on successful scan, double vibration on error/not found.
motion_and_haptics.animations: Instant. Zero ease-in-out delays. Optimize for speed and volume scanning. Snap transitions.

rules: Use icons heavily for empty states (e.g., Box icon, SearchX) and UI actions.
No rounded, soft icons. Keep them sharp.

image_urls.description: Minimal dark background for the empty states if an image is strictly required, though Lucide icons are preferred.

testing.data_testid_rule: Every interactive element (inputs, buttons, list items, toggles, scan results) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., search-input, product-card, speed-mode-toggle).
